fact_nuggets.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Chloroblast inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its maximum HP rounded up. It also lowers the user's action speed. Pokemon Legends: Arceus Category Special PP 5 Agile Strong Power 120 100 140 Accuracy 95% 95% 100% Action speed modifier Self +5 +2 +8 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Recoil 50% 33% 66% ? ? ? ? Damages the user by a percentage of its total HP Reduces the user's action speed Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Chloroblast has a base power of 150. The user takes recoil damage equal to half of its maximum HP rounded up unless the user has Magic Guard or Rock Head , or the target has Sap Sipper ; its Speed is not lowered.
